mapper.insert: insert into interview_session (id, user_id, job_position, interview_type, difficulty, duration_minutes, interaction_mode, status, current_question_no, version) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{jobPosition}, #{interviewType}, #{difficulty}, #{durationMinutes}, #{interactionMode}, #{status}, #{currentQuestionNo}, #{version})
mapper.select: select id, user_id, job_position, interview_type, difficulty, duration_minutes, interaction_mode, status, current_question_no, version, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at from interview_session where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update interview_session set status = 'RUNNING', started_at = coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 'CREATED' and version = #{version}
update interview_session set current_question_no = #{questionNo}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 'RUNNING'
update interview_session set status = 'FINISHED', finished_at = current_timestamp, version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status = 'RUNNING'

update interview_session set status = 'CANCELLED', finished_at = coalesce(finished_at, current_timestamp), version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and status in ('CREATED', 'RUNNING') and version = #{version}
